description.unified: [Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores HP every 0.5 sec for 5 sec->Heals 4 allies with lowest HP 10% of Max HP, and heals extra ??? HP over 8 sec]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
[Removes harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic Defense by 50(1+0.3Skill Level) for 6 sec->Dispels all negative effects. M.DEF is increased by ??? for 20 sec].
Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over [10 time(s)->10 attacks] to enemies within range. [and reduces their Attack Speed by 25% for 10 sec->Hit enemies' ATK Spd is reduced by 25%].
Every 7 sec, [restores 1000 Mana and HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP->an ally with the lowest Hp recovers 1 orb of mana and ??? HP].

IV.unified: [Increases CC Resist by 300 for 6 sec->CC Resist is increased by 250 for 20 sec].

light.unified: Mana [cost->Cost] is increased by [1000->1] and [the effect now applies to all allies->skill effect range changes to all allies].

dark.unified: Increases additional M.DEF by [13%->10%] of own M.DEF.

light.unified: Each hit [removes 250 mana from the target->(added) removes 250 mana from the target] [(removed) Magic Damage taken by the target is increased by 25%].

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Silence enemies in range for 1 sec [(removed) Physical Damage taken by the target is increased by 25%].

light.unified: Uses the skill every 5 sec [(removed) Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec].

dark.unified: Also supplies 1 orb of mana to the ally with the highest ATK [(removed) Additionally restores 500 Mana to the 2 allies with the highest Attack].

description.unified: [Soulrush] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.
Every 20 sec, an ally with the lowest HP turns invisible for {0} sec. An invisible ally becomes immune to P.DMG, and HP will not drop below 1%. MP Recovery per sec is increased to [50%->{1}%].
